response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics and the comic-style dialogue. The Reference JSON provided partial lyrics for 'Kyubijizumu', which I have supplemented with on-screen text and audio transcription to ensure complete coverage. Dialogue transcription and translation are derived from the hardcoded Japanese subtitles and English text bubbles. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the audio waveforms, ensuring no cross-pause merging and preventing cascading delays in the fast-paced song sections.

subtitles.original: いま調べている事件の被害者だよ。
subtitles.english: The victim from a case I'm working.

subtitles.original: あっ、報酬はいつもの値段でいいよね？
subtitles.english: Anyway, you're charging the standard fee, right?

subtitles.original: 悪いけど今回はツケにしといて。
subtitles.english: Sorry, but can you put it on my tab?

subtitles.original: でも前回もツケって言ってましたよね…。
subtitles.english: But you put the last one on your tab too...

subtitles.original: じゃあイナは特別に、１回だけタダで依頼を受けてあげるから。
subtitles.english: Maybe we could do a trade then? I'll solve one case for you for free.

subtitles.original: それよりも…歌がいいな〜。
subtitles.english: Oooorr... I'll trade you for a song~

subtitles.original: はい？
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: だってアーニャさん最近ずっと怖い顔してますよ。
subtitles.english: Come on! You've been so serious lately.

subtitles.original: たまには息抜きしないと。
subtitles.english: You gotta get loose sometimes.

subtitles.original: 私と１曲歌ってくれたら、絵は差し上げます。どうですか？
subtitles.english: So one song with me, and you get to keep the picture. That's the deal~

subtitles.original: そこまで言うなら…歌ってやるか！
subtitles.english: If that's what you want, then alright!

subtitles.original: 大きな白いキャンバスに
subtitles.english: I'm going to put a fiction collage...

subtitles.original: 虚構のコラージュを貼るよ
subtitles.english: ...up on a big white canvas.

subtitles.original: どこからでも綺麗に映る
subtitles.english: It looks beautiful from everywhere.

subtitles.original: 誇張された天使が居たよ
subtitles.english: There was an exaggerated angel.

subtitles.original: 薔薇 人 歪んだ
subtitles.english: Roses, people, distorted,

subtitles.original: 正しくなくても見えた
subtitles.english: even though it didn't look right, it was visible.

subtitles.original: 生きるため立ち寄った美術館のセザンヌに
subtitles.english: To live, I stopped by Cezanne at the art museum.

subtitles.original: なんもわかんないな
subtitles.english: I don't understand anything at all.

subtitles.original: まだ知らずにいても描けた 赤
subtitles.english: Even without knowing, I could draw it, red.

subtitles.original: ずっと塗り込んだ
subtitles.english: I kept on painting it over.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿 きっとそこだった
subtitles.english: Fool, it must have been right there.

subtitles.original: 一筆書きの絵画だけどそこがいいな
subtitles.english: A single-stroke painting, but I like it.

subtitles.original: くだらない線だな
subtitles.english: What a trivial line...

subtitles.original: そのまま
subtitles.english: Just like that.

subtitles.original: きいて ほら かわ
subtitles.english: Listen, see, side...

subtitles.original: きいて ほら かわ
subtitles.english: Listen, see, side...

subtitles.original: 泣いて見えた朝
subtitles.english: Morning that looked like it was crying.

subtitles.original: ラララララララ
subtitles.english: La la la la la la la

subtitles.original: 笑うより浮いた
subtitles.english: Floated rather than smiled.

subtitles.original: 甘い殻の
subtitles.english: From a sweet shell.

subtitles.original: ギュッて咲いてから
subtitles.english: Once it bloomed tight,

subtitles.original: ギュッて泣いてから
subtitles.english: Once it cried tight,

subtitles.original: 抱いてないてから
subtitles.english: Once it cried in an embrace,

subtitles.original: ラララララララ
subtitles.english: La la la la la la la

subtitles.original: 嘆く壁に描いた
subtitles.english: Painted on the wailing wall,

subtitles.original: パブロ ピカソ
subtitles.english: Pablo Picasso.

subtitles.original: なぜか私のことだなって眺めちゃったよ
subtitles.english: For some reason, I gazed at it, thinking it was about me.

subtitles.original: これが欲しいなって感じたら
subtitles.english: If I feel like I want this,

subtitles.original: セザンヌの絵を希求
subtitles.english: I long for Cezanne's paintings.

subtitles.original: なんてね
subtitles.english: Just kidding.

subtitles.original: 同人が囚われじっと見てたよ
subtitles.english: The colleague was trapped, staring intently.

subtitles.original: 今 嘘を重ねられば
subtitles.english: If I pile up lies now,

subtitles.original: 本物の意味あるのかな
subtitles.english: will there be any meaning in what's real?

subtitles.original: 真実いだいたまま
subtitles.english: Holding the truth within,

subtitles.original: 飾り落ちて床で死んでた
subtitles.english: decorations fell and died on the floor.

subtitles.original: じっと ずっと塗り込んだ
subtitles.english: Steadfastly, I kept on painting over.

subtitles.original: やっぱ ずっとよかった
subtitles.english: After all, it was good all along.

subtitles.original: いやらしい線だな
subtitles.english: What an unpleasant line...

subtitles.original: 今もああ
subtitles.english: Even now, ah...

subtitles.original: きいて ほら かわ
subtitles.english: Listen, see, side...

subtitles.original: きいて ほら かわ
subtitles.english: Listen, see, side...

subtitles.original: 咲いて散った花
subtitles.english: Flowers that bloomed and scattered.

subtitles.original: ラララララララ
subtitles.english: La la la la la la la

subtitles.original: 笑うように見えた
subtitles.english: It looked like it was smiling.

subtitles.original: 受からぬ
subtitles.english: Won't pass.

subtitles.original: ギュッて抱いてから
subtitles.english: Once it embraced tight,

subtitles.original: ギュッて泣いてから
subtitles.english: Once it cried tight,

subtitles.original: 抱いてないてから
subtitles.english: Once it cried in an embrace,

subtitles.original: ラララララララ
subtitles.english: La la la la la la la

subtitles.original: 嘆く壁に描いた
subtitles.english: Painted on the wailing wall,

subtitles.original: パブロ ピカソ
subtitles.english: Pablo Picasso.

subtitles.original: 私 嘘のピカソ
subtitles.english: I am a false Picasso.

subtitles.original: やっと来た。
subtitles.english: Finally.

subtitles.original: こんな不気味な場所で待たせないでほしいんだけど。
subtitles.english: This is a creepy place to make someone wait.

subtitles.original: 現場を調べたらKFPの近くに寄るから、店の近くで待っててって言ったのに。
subtitles.english: I told you I'd come to the nearby KFP after investigating the crime scene.

subtitles.original: そんなの無理！
subtitles.english: Not a chance!

subtitles.original: アンタと話すだけでもイヤなのに、話してるところを人に見られたりしたらそれこそ最悪。
subtitles.english: It's bad enough I have to talk to you. I don't want others to be around to see it.

subtitles.original: そんなアンタが手を貸してくれるなんて意外だけどね。
subtitles.english: I'm surprised you're willing to cooperate in the first place.

subtitles.original: それは…例の殺人事件以降、いろいろ妙なことが起こってるの。
subtitles.english: Yeah, well, ever since the murder, weird things have been happening.

subtitles.original: アンタが解決してくれるんなら、こうやって会うのもやむなしよ。イヤだけど。
subtitles.english: I figure if you can help solve it, then it's worth the trouble of meeting with you. Just barely.

subtitles.original: 妙なことが起こってる？
subtitles.english: What weirdness?

subtitles.original: 「人の形をした黒い影が見えた」って報告が、うちの従業員からちょくちょく出てるの。
subtitles.english: Some of my employees have been complaining about seeing a shadowy figure.

subtitles.original: 話によれば、最初は夢の中にそれが現れたんだけど、今は起きてる時も見え得るって――
subtitles.english: They say it started with bad dreams, but now some are seeing it even when they're—

subtitles.original: アーニャ！
subtitles.english: Anya!

subtitles.original: だ…大丈夫。それより…
subtitles.english: I'm... fine. Don't worry about me.

subtitles.original: これ見て。
subtitles.english: Look at this.

subtitles.original: まったくもう、アンタはいつも大げさすぎ…ん？
subtitles.english: Hmph. 'Course. You're just always being overly dramatic... huh?

subtitles.original: おかしいな。現場の証拠品は警察が全部回収したはずなのに。
subtitles.english: Weird. I figured the cops would have already collected all the evidence.

subtitles.original: この近くに住んでるKFPの従業員で、被害者のことを知ってる者は？
subtitles.english: Did any of your employees who live nearby know the victim?

subtitles.original: いない。
subtitles.english: Nope.

subtitles.original: 分かった。新しい情報が入ったらまた教えて。
subtitles.english: Alright. Let me know if you hear anything else.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待った！
subtitles.english: Wait!

subtitles.original: それだけ？
subtitles.english: That's it?

subtitles.original: 私の時間を奪っておいてタダで帰るつもり？
subtitles.english: You're not even gonna compensate me for my time?

subtitles.original: 従業員のためかと思いきや、結局カネか。
subtitles.english: I thought you were doing this to help your employees.

subtitles.original: タダ働きはしない主義なの。
subtitles.english: I'm still a businesswoman.

subtitles.original: いま持ち合わせがないんだけど、代わりに歌で支払うっていうのはどう？
subtitles.english: Well, I don't have any cash on me, but I can pay you in song.

subtitles.original: ウソでしょ？
subtitles.english: Seriously?

subtitles.original: 歌うの？
subtitles.english: You think I'd want to sing?

subtitles.original: アンタと？
subtitles.english: With you?

subtitles.original: イナは歌で喜んでくれたけどなー。
subtitles.english: Ina accepted payment in song.

subtitles.original: ただ、イナと歌うのは楽しいけど、
subtitles.english: But then, singing with her is fun.
